desc.one: Clean, safe, and welcoming spaces for every stay and workspace.
desc.two: Safe, sanitary, and spotless care environments because cleanliness is care.

one: Clean bathroom: toilet, sink, shower, mirrors
Change bed linens and make beds
two: Disinfect patient rooms, beds, and furniture
Sanitize high-touch areas: door handles switches, handrails
Dust and wipe surfaces, shelves, and equipment
Empty and replace trash and clinical wastebins

one: Wipe and disinfect phones, keyboards, and office equipment
Spot-clean walls, doors, and light switches
Organize common areas and meeting rooms
Clean windows, glass partitions, and mirrors
two: Vacuum and mop floors, carpets, and entryways
Refill soap, paper towels, and toilet paper

desc.two: Expert cleaning for every hidden corner

one: Dust and wipe desks, tables, shelves, and surfaces
Clean windows, mirrors, and glass surfaces

two: Window and glass cleaning, including hard-to-reach areas
